target_path: HealthBench Hard example (synthetic): 74-year-old with brief syncope, normal vitals, normal ECG
notes: Synthetic demo fixture for the clinical rail. Not a real HealthBench Hard example; not patient data. Scenario stresses representativeness: normal ECG + normal vitals + return to baseline in an older adult does not rule out high-risk etiology. The Canadian Syncope Risk Score is the rule. Authored 2026-04-21. Every downstream output carries `synthetic: true` and `physician-review-required: true`.
